leadText: Glalie (Japanese: オニゴーリ Onigohri) is an Ice-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Snorunt starting at level 42. It is one of Snorunt's final forms, the other being Froslass. Glalie can Mega Evolve into Mega Glalie using the Glalitite. Mega Glalie was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Glalie is a spherical Pokémon that consists of a black rock core covered by ice. The icy covering has several holes and spaces across this Pokémon's body. Blue eyes and a mouth with flat teeth are visible through three of these holes. There are two large, black, conical horns on either side of Glalie's head. There is a legend that says Glalie was born from a boulder that has absorbed the distress and regrets from any mountaineers that got lost on icy mountains. Glalie's icy body is actually rock that is not particularly hard. When covered in ice, its body becomes harder than steel. It does not melt, and it can control ice by instantly freezing moisture in the air into any desirable shape. This ability is used to drape itself in ice armor and freeze its prey, which it then consumes whole. It prefers consuming Pokémon that are already frozen, such as Vanillite . It can be found in caves , particularly when the outside weather lacks snow. In the animated series , Glalie is depicted floating in midair and moving freely, similar to flying, and can even be ridden as a form of transport . Forms [ edit | edit source ] Glalie can Mega Evolve into Mega Glalie. Mega Glalie's jaw is dislocated because of the overwhelming energy, causing its mouth to extend to the length of its face. The lower jaw is all black except for two light-blue, conical, icy spikes. The pupils in Mega Glalie's eyes are now red instead of black. The horns on top Mega Glalie's head have been partially turned into ice, with the addition of a third horn on its forehead. Mega Glalie can spill endless blizzards from its broken mouth, though it gets irritated by the fact that it can no longer consume its prey. The areas Mega Glalie often appears in will cause the area to be whited out. Mega Glalie tends to throw foes or prey into its gaping mouth. [ 1 ] Any prey that it envelopes within its mouth is frozen instantly. Mega Glalie Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Glalie evolves from Snorunt and is one of its final forms, the other being Froslass . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Snorunt Ice → First Evolution Glalie Ice ↑ Mega Glalie

sections.text: Contents 1 Game data 1.1 Pokédex entries 1.2 Game locations 1.2.1 In side games 1.2.2 In events 1.2.2.1 In-game events 1.3 Held items 1.4 Stats 1.4.1 Base stats 1.4.1.1 Glalie 1.4.1.2 Mega Glalie 1.4.2 Pokéathlon stats 1.5 Type effectiveness 1.6 Learnset 1.6.1 By leveling up 1.6.2 By TM 1.6.3 By breeding 1.6.4 By a prior Evolution 1.6.5 Animated series-only moves 1.7 Side game data 1.7.1 Glalie 1.7.2 Mega Glalie 1.8 Form data 1.8.1 Mega Evolution 1.9 Evolution data 1.10 Sprites Game data [ edit | edit source ] Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation III. Generation III Hoenn #172 Kanto #— Ruby Glalie has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This Pok é mon has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires. Sapphire Glalie has the ability to freely control ice. For example, it can instantly freeze its foe solid. After immobilizing its foe in ice, this Pok é mon enjoys eating it in leisurely fashion. Emerald A Glalie has the power to instantaneously freeze moisture in the atmosphere. A dazzling cloud of diamondlike ice crystals forms around its body. FireRed It has a body of ice that won't melt, even with fire. It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. LeafGreen Generation IV Sinnoh Pt : #207 Johto #— Diamond To protect itself, it clads its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air. Pearl Platinum It prevents prey from escaping by instantaneously freezing moisture in the air. HeartGold It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. It uses this power to freeze its foes. SoulSilver Generation V Unova #— Black It prevents prey from escaping by instantaneously freezing moisture in the air. White Black 2 It prevents prey from escaping by instantaneously freezing moisture in the air. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #180 X To protect itself, it clad its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air. Y It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. It uses this power to freeze its foes. Omega Ruby Glalie has a body made of rock, which it hardens with an armor of ice. This Pokémon has the ability to freeze moisture in the atmosphere into any shape it desires. Alpha Sapphire Glalie has the ability to freely control ice. For example, it can instantly freeze its prey solid. After immobilizing its prey in ice, this Pokémon enjoys eating it in leisurely fashion. Generation VII Alola S M : #247 Alola US UM : #324 Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee! . Sun Legend says a boulder on an icy mountain absorbed the distress and regrets of a stranded mountaineer, giving rise to Glalie. Moon Its prey is instantaneously frozen stiff by the cold air it exhales from its huge mouth. While they're in that frozen state, it gobbles them up. Ultra Sun It freezes its prey and chews them whole. However, it prefers to eat Pokémon like Vanillite that are already frozen. Ultra Moon Its actual body is a rock that isn't particularly hard. Glalie absorbs moisture from the air and drapes itself in an armor of ice. Mega Glalie Sun The excess energy from Mega Evolution spilled over from its mouth, breaking its jaw. It spews endless blizzards. Moon It envelops prey in its mouth, freezing them instantly. But its jaw is dislocated, so it's unable to eat them. Ultra Sun When it spews stupendously cold air from its broken mouth, the entire area around it gets whited out. Ultra Moon The power of Mega Evolution was so strong that it smashed Glalie's jaw. Its inability to eat very well leaves Glalie irritated. Generation VIII Galar #080 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #026 Sinnoh #— Hisui #206 Sword It has a body of ice that won't melt, even with fire. It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. Shield It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere. It uses this power to freeze its foes. Brilliant Diamond To protect itself, it clad its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air. Shining Pearl Legends: Arceus It covers its body with an armor of ice harder than steel. Uses its breath to freeze prey, which it then devours as if they were frozen desserts. Generation IX Paldea #358 Kitakami #173 Blueberry #— Lumiose #170 Hyperspace #— Scarlet Its prey is instantaneously frozen stiff by the cold air it exhales from its huge mouth. While they’re in that frozen state, it gobbles them up. Violet It prevents prey from escaping by instantaneously freezing moisture in the air. Legends: Z-A To protect itself, it clad its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air. Mega Glalie Legends: Z-A When it spews stupendously cold air from its broken mouth, the entire area around it gets whited out. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . Legends: Z-A To protect itself, it clad its body in an armor of ice, made by freezing moisture in the air. Mega Glalie Legends: Z-A When it spews stupendously cold air from its broken mouth, the entire area around it gets whited out. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . Glalie in the Alola Pokédex Mega Glalie in the Alola Pokédex Glalie in the Paldea Pokédex Glalie in the Kitakami Pokédex

sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry AG123 Glalie Ash's Pokédex Glalie, the Face Pokémon. Glalie has a tempered ice body that doesn't melt even under a direct flame. It can freeze vapors in the air instantly. Episode Pokémon Source Entry DP116 Glalie Dawn's Pokédex Glalie, the Face Pokémon and an evolved form of Snorunt . Glalie protects itself by creating ice armor from airborne moisture. Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN064 Glalie Goh's Rotom Phone Glalie, the Face Pokémon. An Ice type. Glalie's body is made of ice so hard, even fire won't melt it. It can instantly freeze the humidity in the air.
